scope: Phase 0 only — walking skeleton green; remaining phases (01-05 from distill/roadmap.json) deferred per Mayor checkpoint

phases.name: Walking skeleton green
phases.description: Replace 11 RED scaffolds with thin real implementations sufficient to make the walking skeleton scenario green end-to-end. Outside-In TDD ordering: each step replaces one scaffold module with the minimum implementation needed for the next outer step. Per ADR-018 §Decision Outcome: per-flow eject via dbtRunner Python API, per-turn Pandera, probe() composition root.

steps.name: Add dbt-core dbt-duckdb pandera test extras
steps.criteria: backend/pyproject.toml has [project.optional-dependencies] test with dbt-core>=1.8 dbt-duckdb>=1.8 pandera>=0.29; uv sync succeeds; backend/app code does not import dbt or pandera (verified by new unit test); existing backend tests still green.

steps.name: Implement DuckDBProfileSeeder
steps.criteria: Seed writes profiles.yml with concrete s3 endpoint and credentials from minio_creds dict; raises RuntimeError naming the missing key when an env_var placeholder is undefined; SCAFFOLD marker removed from seeder.py.

steps.name: Implement DbtRunner via dbtRunner.invoke
steps.criteria: DbtRunner.run_build_and_test invokes dbt.cli.main.dbtRunner for deps then build then test sequentially; returns last dbtRunnerResult; raises on failure surfacing dbtRunnerResult.exception; SCAFFOLD marker removed from runner.py; no subprocess.run.

steps.name: Implement RunResultsParser from dbtRunnerResult
steps.criteria: Parser populates EjectTestReport(status,models_built,tests_run,failures) from dbtRunnerResult.result list; status pass when all RunResult.status == success otherwise fail; falls back to target/run_results.json only when .result is None; SCAFFOLD marker removed.

steps.name: Implement five probe functions happy paths
steps.criteria: All 5 probes return ProbeReport(ok=True) when substrate healthy; probe_dbt_runner_importable verifies dbt.cli.main import + version >= 1.8; probe_run_results_shape uses dbtRunner parse against fixture project; failure-injection paths deferred to distill Phase 1.

steps.name: Implement EjectAndTestOrchestrator composing probes seeder runner parser
steps.criteria: probe() invokes 5 probes once and aggregates ProbeReport; eject_and_test fetches zip unzips seeds runs parses returns EjectTestReport; EjectOrchestratorProtocol runtime_checkable conformance; SCAFFOLD removed from orchestrator.py and protocols.py.

steps.name: Implement PanderaValidator and OrdersStaging schema
steps.criteria: PanderaValidator.validate returns ValidationResult(status,errors,elapsed_ms); OrdersStaging schema covers minimal columns for walking skeleton fixture; pass case under 200ms with empty errors; fail case returns column-level error messages; SCAFFOLD removed.

steps.name: Wire harness eject and validate plus acceptance fixture
steps.criteria: DatasetLayerHarness.eject_and_test delegates to EjectAndTestOrchestrator; .validate_after delegates to PanderaValidator; session-scoped eject_orchestrator fixture probes once and skips with named reason on failure; AssertionError scaffold bodies removed; walking-skeleton.feature green when compose+GROQ provisioned.
